title: desmazeria philistaea subsp. rohlfsiana
intro: Desmazeria philistaea subsp. rohlfsiana, also known as Rohlfs' Restharrow, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to North Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rohlfs' Restharrow include its potential to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Rohlfs' Restharrow include its roots being used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
